name: sensegrep
description: Semantic + structural code search for AI agents. Read the right code, not more code — combining semantic search, exact matching, and AST-aware retrieval.

interface.shortDescription: Semantic grep for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Semantic + structural code search for AI agents. Read the right code, not more code — sensegrep combines semantic search, exact matching, and AST-aware structural retrieval to deliver smaller, more relevant context. Exposes search, survey, cluster, index, and duplicate-detection tools over MCP.
defaultPrompt: Search this codebase by meaning with sensegrep
Find logical duplicate code with sensegrep
